description: Inline modifier that sets the stroke (outline) thickness in pixels. Accepts a positive number for line width, ranging from 0.1 (very thin) to 10 (very thick), with a default of 1.
utility: Set stroke width/thickness on shapes using inline modifier

arguments.name: width
arguments.description: Stroke width in pixels - positive number, e.g., 0.5, 1, 2, 5

alternates.description: Very thin stroke, nearly invisible outline
Combine stroke width with fill image and fill opacity

examples.scenario: Rectangle with thin stroke and fill image
Standalone stroke command with width change
